ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123456789 has Shipped
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123456789 has shipped via Amazon Logistics. Estimated delivery: 10-12 Apr 2026.
Tracking #: 920123456789.

If you have any questions, reply to this email.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Update Required for Your IT Support Ticket #987654
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Our records show that your IT support ticket #987654 is pending. To resolve, please verify your credentials by clicking the link below and entering your account details.

<URL>

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, your account will be locked.

Thank you,
IT Helpdesk Team
